app.name: Dorm
app.tagline: Find your campus home and a roommate that fits.

universities.JUST: Jordan University of Science and Technology

match.label: match
match.breakdownTitle: How you fit with current tenants
match.matchedOnEmpty: No perfect matches yet — but no opposites either.
match.differedOnEmpty: Nothing to clash on — looks compatible.
match.noTenantsExplain: No current tenants — you'd be moving in fresh.

apply.submittedText: We've sent your application for {{title}} to the owner. They'll respond shortly.
apply.intro: Send a short message to the owner of {{title}}. Tell them a bit about yourself and why you'd be a good fit.
apply.scoreCalloutHint: The owner sees your snapshot match with current tenants alongside your message.
apply.placeholder: Hi! I'm a 3rd-year CS student looking for a quiet spot near campus…
apply.tooShort: A bit longer please — at least 20 characters.
apply.comingSoon: Applications open in the next phase — your form is ready, the backend lands soon.

myApps.title: My applications
myApps.subtitle: Track the status of apartments you've applied to.

empty.title: No applications yet
empty.description: Browse apartments and send your first application — they'll show up here.
empty.comingSoon: Applications launch in the next phase. You'll see them here as soon as you apply.

landing.heroTitle: Find your campus home — and a roommate that fits.
landing.feature1Text: A short 8-question quiz powers a transparent compatibility score with current tenants.
landing.feature2Text: Filter by university, neighborhood and walking minutes — see exactly what fits.
landing.feature3Text: University-email badges and real reviews from previous tenants keep things honest.

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to find your next campus home.
auth.registerSubtitle: A few details and you're in.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.forgotSent: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a reset link.
auth.resetSubtitle: Enter a new password to finish resetting.
auth.resetSuccessText: You can log in with your new password now.
auth.verifyEmailFailure: Verification link is invalid or expired.
auth.verifyEmailMissingToken: No verification token in the link.
auth.universityHelp: Select your university (you can change this later).

browse.title: Browse apartments
browse.subtitle: Filter by university, neighborhood, price and more.

empty.title: No apartments match your filters
empty.description: Try widening the price range or removing a few filters.

apartments.noTenantsYet: No tenants yet — you'd be among the first.
apartments.locationApprox: Approximate area — exact address shared after your application is accepted.
apartments.applyComingSoon: Applications open in the next phase.
apartments.phoneLocked: Phone number unlocks when your application is accepted
apartments.addressLockedText: We show the neighborhood; the street-level address unlocks when the owner accepts your application.
apartments.notFoundText: This listing may have been removed, suspended, or hidden by the visibility rules.

quiz.title: Help us match you
quiz.subtitle: Eight short questions — your answers stay private and power your match scores.

SleepSchedule.title: Sleep schedule
SleepSchedule.help: When are you usually most awake and active at home?

Cleanliness.title: Cleanliness
Cleanliness.help: How tidy do you keep shared spaces?

SocialStyle.title: Social style
SocialStyle.help: How social are you at home with your roommates?

Guests.title: Guests
Guests.help: How often do you have friends over?

Cooking.title: Cooking
Cooking.help: How much do you cook at home?

PetTolerance.title: Pets
PetTolerance.help: How do you feel about living with pets?

dashboard.title: Your dashboard
dashboard.comingSoon: More features land each phase. Browse apartments, take the quiz, apply, and message owners — all coming up.
dashboard.studentNote: You're signed in as a Student.
dashboard.ownerNote: You're signed in as an Apartment owner.
dashboard.adminNote: You're signed in as an Admin.
dashboard.emailUnverifiedHint: Click the verification link in your inbox to unlock applying to apartments.

quizCta.title: Take the lifestyle quiz
quizCta.text: Eight short questions unlock real compatibility scores — and you need them to apply to apartments.

recentApps.title: Recent applications
recentApps.empty: You haven't applied to any apartments yet.

ownerCards.pendingEmptyHint: When students apply, you'll review them here.

messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: Chat with apartment owners and students.

empty.title: No conversations yet
empty.description: Conversations start automatically when you apply to an apartment.

messages.pickOneHint: Select a chat from the list to view messages.
messages.startConversation: Say hi to start the conversation.

ownerApps.title: Applications received
ownerApps.subtitle: Review applicants and accept the best fit for each spot.

empty.title: Nothing here
empty.all: You haven't received any applications yet.
empty.accepted: You haven't accepted any applications yet.

empty.title: You haven't listed an apartment yet
empty.description: Add your first listing to start receiving applications from compatible students.

newListing.title: New listing
newListing.subtitle: Tell students about the place. You can add photos right after publishing.

basics.title: Basics
basics.hint: Title, description, and where it is.

location.title: Location
location.hint: Click on the map to set the apartment's pin. The exact street is only visible to accepted applicants.

pricing.title: Pricing & spots
pricing.hint: Full monthly rent, total beds in the apartment, and how many are open right now.

amenities.title: Amenities
amenities.hint: Pick everything available — it makes the listing easier to find.

rules.title: House rules
rules.hint: Set the gender policy and a few day-to-day rules.

fields.title: Title
fields.addressDetailHint: Only visible to students whose application you've accepted.
fields.genderTypeHint: Most listings in Jordan are single-gender. Pick what fits your home.

errors.spotsExceedsTotal: Available spots can't exceed total spots.

editListing.title: Edit listing
editListing.subtitle: Adjust details or refresh photos.
editListing.placeholderNotice: Full inline editing comes in the next polish phase. For now you can manage photos or view the listing.
editListing.fullEditComing: Field-by-field editing arrives in a later phase.

photos.title: Photos
photos.subtitle: Upload up to 10 photos. The first one shows up on the apartment card.

dropzone.title: Drop photos here or click to browse
dropzone.hint: JPG, PNG or WebP — up to 5 MB each.

errors.badType: Skipped {{name}} — only JPG, PNG and WebP are accepted.

payments.title: Payments
payments.subtitle: Match commissions, featured boosts and verified badge — all in one place.

empty.title: No payments yet
empty.description: Once you complete a match, boost a listing or buy a verified badge, the receipt will land here.

admin.title: Admin panel
admin.subtitle: Monitor users, listings, reports and revenue across the platform.

empty.title: No users match
empty.description: Try a different search term or role filter.

empty.title: No listings match
empty.description: Try a different search term or status filter.

empty.title: No reports
empty.description: When students flag listings, they show up here.

report.thanksText: Thanks — our team will review this listing shortly.
report.intro: Help us keep Dorm safe. Why are you reporting "{{title}}"?
report.descHint: Add any details that might help our team review faster.

rating.thanksText: Your feedback helps other students find a great fit.
rating.intro: How was your experience with {{name}} at {{apartment}}?
rating.commentHint: Share what stood out — what worked well, what could have been better.

errors.generic: Something didn't quite work — please try again.
errors.network: We couldn't reach the server. Check your connection.
errors.notFoundText: The page you were looking for isn't here.

field.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
field.passwordNeedsLetter: Password needs at least one letter.
field.passwordNeedsDigit: Password needs at least one digit.
